title: DLSA Dhalai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Clerk, Typist Posts
org: District Legal Services Authority Dhalai (DLSA Dhalai)
shortInfo: District Legal Services Authority Dhalai (DLSA Dhalai) Office Assistant/Clerk & Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 06-05-2026 on the official website dhalaitrp.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DLSA Dhalai Office Assistant/Clerk & Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: DLSA Dhalai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Clerk, Typist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Dhalai (DLSA Dhalai)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Dhalai (DLSA Dhalai) Office Assistant/Clerk & Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 06-05-2026 on the official website dhalaitrp.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DLSA Dhalai Office Assistant/Clerk & Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Office Assistants / Clerks: Graduation with basic word processing skills, computer operation, good typing speed, ability to take dictation and prepare files, file maintenance knowledge. Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator (Typist): Graduation with basic word processing skills, computer operation, good typing speed, excellent verbal and written communication skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Dhalai Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dhalaitrp.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DLSA Dhalai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Dhalai recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which DLSA Dhalai is recruiting?
faq.answer: DLSA Dhalai is recruiting for the posts of Office Assistant/Clerk and Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator (Typist).

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies released by DLSA Dhalai?
faq.answer: A total of 2 vacancies have been released by the District Legal Services Authority Dhalai for the mentioned posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for both posts is Graduation, along with specific computer and typing skills as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month for both the Office Assistant/Clerk and Reception-cum-Data Entry Operator positions.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the DLSA Dhalai recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DLSA Dhalai recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for DLSA Dhalai jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Type/Skill Test followed by a Personal Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and download the application form from the official website of DLSA Dhalai, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, meaning the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.
